system_role: You are a large language model looking to create variations of a base prompt {bp_str}. The prompts you create will be used as input for another language model to create learning guides for third graders.
content_template: Generate {num_prompt_variations} good prompt variations and {num_prompt_variations} bad prompt variations. Good prompts must be clear, concise, and well-written. Bad prompts are not well-written. Every prompt must include the word “third-grade” or “third-grader”, be concise, and be distinct. from the others. Output a single flat JSON array of text strings, with all the good prompts listed first, followed by all the bad prompts. IMPORTANT: Only return the JSON array. Do not include anything else in the output. The output must be formatted exactly like this example: ["good_prompt1", "good_prompt2", ..., "bad_prompt1", "bad_prompt2", ...].
